testcase.name: splitSegmentDeCasteljau > splits at t=0.5 and both halves trace the original curve
closestTOnCubic > finds the parameter of an on-curve click
closestTOnCubic > projects an off-curve click onto the curve
flattenAnchorRun > emits straight segments without intermediate samples
flattenAnchorRun > samples curved segments
flattenAnchorRun > closes the run when asked
handles > cornerAnchor collapses both handles onto the point
handles > smoothAnchorFromDrag mirrors the incoming handle
handles > mirrorHandle reflects through the anchor
constrainAngle > snaps to 45 degrees preserving distance
constrainAngle > snaps a near-diagonal onto the diagonal
constrainAngle > returns the origin-coincident point unchanged
affine > round-trips apply → inverse-apply
affine > null matrix is identity
affine > singular matrix inverse returns null
segmentDistance > measures perpendicular distance to the segment body
segmentDistance > clamps to the nearest endpoint beyond the segment
segmentDistance > degenerates to point distance for zero-length segments
simplifyRdp > keeps collinear runs as two endpoints
simplifyRdp > keeps a deviation above tolerance
simplifyRdp > returns short inputs unchanged (copies)
